description_long: This is a sleek, modern airplane with a streamlined fuselage and sharply swept wings, reminiscent of a space shuttle or advanced jet. The wings are mid-mounted and feature a pronounced delta shape, with dark leading and trailing edges for aerodynamic efficiency. At the rear, three large circular jet engines are clustered together, flanked by a pair of vertical stabilizers and a prominent tailplane. The cockpit is positioned at the very front, with a dark, tinted canopy that suggests an enclosed, forward-facing pilot area. The landing gear is partially visible, with a nose wheel and main gear tucked beneath the fuselage, indicating a retractable tricycle configuration. The exterior is primarily light gray with black accents, giving it a high-tech, futuristic appearance.
description: A futuristic, delta-winged airplane with a forward cockpit, three rear jet engines, and a sleek, light gray exterior with black accents.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full delta wing shape, three rear jet engines, and the overall streamlined form.
description_view_1: Rear three-quarter view highlighting the clustered jet engines, vertical stabilizers, and partially visible landing gear.
description_view_2: Side profile view displaying the mid-mounted delta wings, forward cockpit, and the length of the fuselage.
description_view_3: Rear underside view emphasizing the engine nozzles, tailplane, and the angular geometry of the wings and stabilizers.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, sharply swept delta wings with no visible winglets and slight anhedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Triple rear-mounted jet engines in a clustered configuration.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with twin vertical stabilizers and a single horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear with one nose wheel and two main gear units.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single dark canopy, likely single or dual-seat.
